77.reason: [Error] If nextChar is -1 (EOF), unread() throws IOException. Also, line count is not updated for '\n' inside multi-line comments.

138.reason: [The code assumes every character constant has exactly one character between two single quotes, but it does not validate whether the second read character is actually a closing quote. If the input contains a malformed character literal like '' or 'ab', this logic will incorrectly consume extra characters and may misinterpret subsequent tokens. Additionally, it fails to handle escape sequences or detect lexical errors such as unclosed character constants.]
